steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the order in which the supercontinents formed: Ur (3.1 billion years ago) came first, then Pangaea (300 million years ago) much later.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
(C) states directly that Pangaea formed long after Ur — that's the order, in plain temporal language.

(A) only mentions Ur (no order). (B) defines what supercontinents are. (D) describes the cycle generically. None emphasize order like (C) does.

C is correct.
